center.name: 伊托姆伯維山脈
center.summary: 伊托姆伯維山脈是非洲中部國家剛果民主共和國的山脈，位於該國東部南基伍省，處於坦噶尼喀湖西岸，海拔高度3,475米，是東部低地大猩猩、黑猩猩和普通非洲象。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Ituri batis occurs in the eastern Congo Basin in Ituri and Itombwe in the north eastern Democratic Republic of Congo where it is uncommon and in the Budongo Forest in western Uganda where it is common. The Ituri batis is found in lowland forest, between
